title: Data from: The association between salivary amylase gene copy number and enzyme activity with type 2 diabetes status.
author: Poole, Angela C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This file contains data supporting results reported in Devarakonda et. al., 2025, "The association between salivary amylase gene copy number and enzyme activity with type 2 diabetes status". In Devarakonda et. al., 2025, we found: comparable estimates for  AMY1  gene copy number (CN) using quantitative and droplet digital PCR; correlation between  AMY1  CN and salivary amylase activity; correlation between the time of saliva collection and salivary amylase activity throughout the day; and a modified relationship between salivary amylase activity and  AMY1  gene copy number depending on self-reported type 2 diabetes status.
steps_raw: This file contains data supporting results reported in Devarakonda et. al., 2025, "The association between salivary amylase gene copy number and enzyme activity with type 2 diabetes status". In Devarakonda et. al., 2025, we found: comparable estimates for  AMY1  gene copy number (CN) using quantitative and droplet digital PCR; correlation between  AMY1  CN and salivary amylase activity; correlation between the time of saliva collection and salivary amylase activity throughout the day; and a modified relationship between salivary amylase activity and  AMY1  gene copy number depending on self-reported type 2 diabetes status.
